title: Tamil Nadu receives surplus Cauvery water for yet another year
description: During June 2025 to May 2026, the State recorded, at Billigundulu, about 330 thousand million cubic feet (tmc ft.) against 177.25 tmc ft. prescribed in the Cauvery Water Disputes Tribunal’s final award of 2007, which was amended by the Supreme Court in its 2018 judgment
